name: What happens if I violate AEO rules?
description: **Sanctions, contempt, dismissal possible.** Never share outside attorneys.[2]

mainEntity.name: What happens if I violate AEO rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Sanctions, contempt, dismissal possible.** Never share outside attorneys.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Violating AEO can lead to contempt, sanctions, or case dismissal.** Breaches expose confidential info risking trade secret loss.[2] Key factors: Strict non-disclosure to parties. Court-ordered limits enforceable. Document handling critical. Immediately self-report errors. Seek protective order amendments proactively. Litigation counsel essential.
